user-modes.description: Initiative and Initiative Dice for each Matrix user mode, with notes

rows.notes: Can be distracting; GM may impose -2 Perception penalty if attention split
Biofeedback damage is Stun; body goes limp
+2 dice pool bonus to all Matrix actions; biofeedback damage is Physical; hot-sim is illegal

noise-distance.description: Noise levels based on physical distance to Matrix target. Applied as negative dice pool modifier to Matrix actions (not defense or resistance tests).

noise-situations.description: Additional noise from situational environmental factors.

rows.noise-level: 1 per hit on Jam Signals actions

noise-zones.description: Noise ratings for common spam zones (commercial/high-traffic areas) and static zones (remote/isolated areas).

rows.static-zone: Rural area, abandoned underground area, heavy rain or snow
Remote place with satellite access only

rows.spam-zone: Massive gathering or during widespread emergency

device-ratings.description: Device Rating categories with representative examples. Device Rating determines Matrix Condition Monitor (8 + DR/2), base Data Processing and Firewall values.

rows.examples: General appliances, public terminals, entertainment systems
Standard personal electronics, basic cyberware, vehicles, drones, weapons, residential security devices
Security vehicles, alphaware, corporate security devices
High-end devices, betaware, military vehicles and security devices
Deltaware, credsticks, black-ops vehicles and security devices

matrix-spotting.description: Rules for spotting Matrix icons based on distance and whether the target is running silent.

rows.running-silent: Opposed Computer + Intuition [Data Processing] v. Logic + Sleaze

notes: Icons with a mark on you can be spotted without a test regardless of distance.
When looking for a silent icon already known to be present: Opposed Computer + Intuition [Data Processing] v. Logic + Sleaze; first hit spots, remaining hits give info.

cyberdecks.description: Standard cyberdeck models with Device Rating, Attribute Array (four values assigned to ASDF in any order), max simultaneous programs, availability, and cost.

matrix-search.description: Matrix Search thresholds and times by information availability. Test: Simple Computer + Intuition [Data Processing]. Net hits above threshold halve remaining time. Failure costs full base time.

rows.information-type: Hidden or Actively Hunted and Erased

matrix-actions.description: All Matrix actions with type, marks required, limit (Matrix attribute), and test formula.

rows.notes: Places 1 mark; can optionally inflict 1 DV per 2 full net hits; 2 marks = -4 pool; 3 marks = -10 pool; can hop grid (defense 4 local / 6 global)
Change icon appearance; target own or any icon with owner access
Sleaze action; reveals OS at time of action start plus defense hits

rows.test: [Data Processing (or special)] v. [appropriate test] or Electronic Warfare + Intuition [Sleaze] v. Intuition + Firewall
rows.notes: Perform action through device; action type matches device action; split pool for multiple devices; Sleaze limit when Sleaze is used
Removes protection from a file
Crashes one running program on the target; cannot restart until device reboots
DV = Attack rating + 1 per net hit + 2 per mark on target; resisted with Device Rating + Firewall

rows.test: Software + Intuition [Firewall] v. Data Bomb Rating × 2
rows.notes: Any net hits removes and deletes bomb; failure triggers bomb

rows.test: Computer + Logic [Data Processing] v. Intuition + Firewall
rows.notes: Create, change, copy, delete, or protect any file. Copying makes you owner. To protect: Simple test, hits = protection rating. Continuous edit: once per Combat Turn.
No test; requires mark to enter; anyone inside can exit; returns to the grid you entered from
Erase a mark; 2 at once: -4 pool; 3 at once: -10 pool; all from same icon/source; cannot change owner
Requires Resonance attribute; Attack action (OS risk, Matrix damage risk)
Rewrites boot code; device shuts down permanently (until software replaced: Extended Software + Logic [Mental] (12, 1 hour)); loses wireless mods, retains physical function
Add Willpower to Attack action defense pool; -10 Initiative Score; lasts rest of Combat Turn
Hop to a grid you have legitimate access to; must leave host first
Places 1 mark (Sleaze action); every 2 full net hits = 1 hit for Matrix Perception; 2 marks: -4; 3 marks: -10; can hop grid (defense 4 local / 6 global)

rows.test: Electronic Warfare + Intuition [Sleaze] v. Intuition + Data Processing
rows.notes: Makes target that was spotting you lose you; cannot hide from icons with a mark on you
Offer other personas the opportunity to mark your icon; set count, duration, offer duration; revocable before mark placed

rows.test: Hardware + Willpower [Firewall] v. Logic + Attack (only if link-locked)
rows.notes: Jacks out and reboots device; dumpshock if link-locked and test fails; beat each link-locker separately with single roll
Turns device into local jammer; hits = noise added to all devices within 100 meters; cannot perform other Matrix actions while jamming

rows.test: Electronic Warfare + Logic [Data Processing] v. Willpower + Firewall
rows.notes: Prerequisites: 3 marks, VR mode, device has rigger adaptation, user has control rig; no test if owner/owner permission

rows.test: Computer + Intuition [Data Processing] (v. Logic + Sleaze for silent targets)
rows.notes: Find icons and analyze Matrix objects; first hit spots distant target; each additional hit reveals one piece of information
See Matrix Search Table for thresholds and times

rows.test: Computer + Logic [Data Processing] v. Willpower + Firewall
rows.notes: Shuts down and reboots at end of current Combat Turn; resets OS to 0, erases all marks; dumpshock if in VR; cannot reboot link-locked devices; owner needs no test
Send text/audio (short sentence), image, or file to a user via commcode; longer messages via DNI; can open live feed
Rating up to net hits; choose file deletion on activation; set passcode; one bomb per file; triggers on read/edit/copy/protect/delete/another-bomb-without-passcode; DV = (Rating)D6

rows.test: Electronic Warfare + Intuition [Sleaze] v. Logic + Firewall
rows.notes: Intercept Matrix traffic between target and any other icon as long as mark is held
Spoof owner identity to control device; only works on devices and agents (not IC, sprites, hosts, personas)
Switch AR ↔ VR; VR→AR loses bonus Initiative Dice; cannot switch if link-locked

rows.test: Computer + Intuition [Data Processing] v. Willpower + Sleaze
rows.notes: Find physical location of device or persona; maintain with at least 1 mark; does not work on hosts or IC

matrix-actions-by-function.description: Matrix actions grouped by functional category for quick reference.

matrix-actions-by-limit.description: Matrix actions grouped by their Matrix attribute limit (Attack, Sleaze, Data Processing, Firewall).
notes: Control Device may or may not use Data Processing as its limit depending on the action performed through the device.

programs.description: All programs (common and hacking) with their effects, availability, and cost. Agents listed separately.

rows.effect: Halves time for Matrix Search actions
Stores an alternate deck configuration; switch to it on next reconfigure (even if Configurator stops running)
+2 to Data Processing limit for Edit File tests
+1 bonus to Firewall attribute
Rating 2 noise reduction
+1 bonus to Data Processing attribute
Run 2 additional programs simultaneously; persona takes 1 additional unresistable Matrix damage box whenever it takes Matrix damage
+2 dice pool modifier to resist Matrix damage
Always know your current Overwatch Score

Attacks against biological targets also cause equal Stun (cold-sim) or Physical (hot-sim) biofeedback damage; applies to damage from failed Attack actions against you too; resisted with Willpower + Firewall
+2 dice pool to resist biofeedback damage
Like Biofeedback but only Stun damage, even in hot-sim
+1 bonus to Attack attribute
+4 dice pool modifier to resist Data Bomb damage
+1 to the rating of any Data Bomb you set while this is running
+2 bonus to Sleaze attribute when attempting Hack on the Fly
Perform a single Matrix action on two targets; single test, each defends separately, modifiers from each count toward pool
Reduces extra damage from marks by 1 DV per mark (attacker's bonus damage)
+2 DV Matrix damage on any action that causes Matrix damage (not to targets damaged by failed attacks against you)
When you cause damage to a persona, target is link-locked until they stop this program or successfully Jack Out
Bonus damage from marks increased by 1 DV per mark
+1 dice pool modifier to resist both Matrix damage and biofeedback damage (stacks)
+2 dice pool modifier to defend against Trace Icon; if demiGOD converges while running, physical location is not revealed
+1 bonus to Sleaze attribute
+2 to Data Processing attribute for Trace Icon tests; if target runs Sneak, negates Sneak's +2 bonus (not both)
Icons can look like anything when using Change Icon; others can see true icon with Matrix Perception (must suspect enough to check)
Autonomous program; uses device Matrix attributes; Computer/Hacking/Cybercombat at agent rating; attacks damage its device
Autonomous program; uses device Matrix attributes; Computer/Hacking/Cybercombat at agent rating; attacks damage its device

sample-host-ratings.description: Representative host ratings by type of organization. Host attributes are distributed as (Rating), (Rating+1), (Rating+2), (Rating+3) in any order chosen by the host owner.

rows.examples: Personal sites, pirate archives, public education
Low-end commercial, private business, public libraries, small policlubs
Social media, small colleges and universities, local police, international policlubs
Matrix games, local corporate hosts, large universities, low-level government
Affluent groups, regional corporate hosts, major government, secure sites
Megacorporate headquarters, military command, clandestine head office

ic-types.description: All Intrusion Countermeasures (IC) types with attack tests and effects. All IC attacks use Host Rating × 2 [Attack] as the dice pool. All IC is considered legal. IC is always in hot-sim mode (4D6 Initiative Dice). Failed IC attacks cause no harm to the attacker. Bricked IC vanishes; host can relaunch next Combat Turn.

rows.effect: On 1+ net hits: reduce target Firewall by 1 (cumulative, until reboot). At Firewall 0: 1 DV Matrix damage per net hit.
On 1+ net hits: reduce target Data Processing by 1 (cumulative, until reboot). At DP 0: 1 DV Matrix damage per net hit.
Causes (Attack) DV Matrix damage (+1 DV/net hit, +2 DV/mark on target) AND equal biofeedback damage. Link-locks target.
Causes (Attack) DV Matrix damage (+1 DV/net hit, +2 DV/mark). Biofeedback is Stun only. Single successful attack also link-locks target.
If IC has a mark on target and hits: crashes one running program (random). Cannot restart until reboot.
On 1+ net hits: reduce target Attack by 1 (cumulative, until reboot). At Attack 0: 1 DV Matrix damage per net hit.
Causes (Attack) DV Matrix damage (+1 DV/net hit, +2 DV/mark).
On 1+ net hits: reduce target Sleaze by 1 (cumulative, until reboot). At Sleaze 0: 1 DV Matrix damage per net hit.

Scans marks and checks for illegal activity via Matrix Perception. No Attack; shares info with host. Doesn't take Matrix damage from failed attacks. Usually runs 24/7 and does not count against host IC limit.
Each successful 'attack' places another mark on the target (for host and its IC), up to maximum 3 marks.
If host has 3 marks on target when Scramble hits: target reboots immediately (dumpshock if in VR).
Causes (Attack) DV Matrix damage (+1 DV/net hit, +2 DV/mark) plus equal biofeedback damage.
Link-locks target on hit. If target is already link-locked, places a mark (up to maximum 3).
If IC has 2+ marks on target and hits: host and owners discover target's physical location (reported to authorities).

living-persona.description: Technomancer living persona attribute mappings. The technomancer's Resonance attribute is the basis for all living persona values.

complex-forms.description: All Resonance Library complex forms. Duration: I=Immediate, S=Sustained, P=Permanent. FV = Fading Value (expressed relative to L = chosen Level). Threading test is Software + Resonance [Level] unless otherwise noted.

rows.effect: Reduce target's Overwatch Score by 1 per hit

rows.test: Opposed Software + Resonance [Level] v. Willpower + Firewall
rows.effect: Reduce target Matrix attribute by net hits (minimum 1); one entry for each of the 4 attributes

rows.test: Software + Resonance [Level] v. owner's Intuition + Data Processing
rows.effect: Make changes to a file equal to net hits (same as Edit File)
Boost target Matrix attribute by hits (max 2× normal rating); one Infusion per attribute at a time; ends if attribute swapped in Reconfigure. One entry for each of the 4 attributes.

rows.test: Software + Resonance [Level] v. Logic + Data Processing
rows.effect: Each net hit adds 1 to target's noise

rows.test: Software + Resonance [Level] v. Willpower + Firewall (threshold: 1 Free / 2 Simple / 3 Complex)
rows.effect: Force device to perform a specified Matrix action as its next available action
Communicate through Resonance channel; each net hit reduces distance noise to target device by 1
1 box Matrix damage per net hit (unresistable)

rows.test: Software + Resonance [Level] v. Intuition + Data Processing
rows.effect: Convincing illusion in the Matrix; target needs Matrix Perception (threshold = net hits) to see through even if suspicious

rows.test: Software + Resonance [Level] v. Intuition + Data Processing (all icons spotting you)
rows.effect: Beat each spotting icon separately; any you beat lose spotting of you

rows.test: Simple Software + Resonance [Level] (threshold: 1 on public grid, 2 on other grids)
rows.effect: Veiled persona's OS doesn't increase due to time; still increases from illegal actions; persona cannot hop to another grid while sustained
Remove 1 box of Matrix damage per hit from target sprite
Increase target's Overwatch Score by 1 per hit (only targets with an OS)
Connect to all grids simultaneously for 1 minute per hit; no cross-grid or public-grid penalties for you (others targeting you do not receive this benefit)

sprites.description: All five sprite types with attribute arrays (expressed relative to L = sprite Level), initiative, Initiative Dice, skills, and powers. Sprite Resonance = compiler's Resonance at time of compilation. Matrix Condition Monitor = 8 + (Level / 2).

sprite-powers.description: All sprite powers. Using a power is a Standard Resonance action (not a Matrix action). Each entry specifies which sprite type(s) have the power.

rows.test: none (passive; requires Matrix Perception to find hidden file)
rows.effect: Conceal a file within another file; invisible to Matrix searches; only findable with Matrix Perception specifically looking for the hidden file

Tag target persona with a cookie file that logs all icon activity; transfers data to sprite at set duration; file runs silent at sprite Level rating; detected with Matrix Perception; removed by deleting protection
Evaluate device internals; each hit = +1 limit bonus to use/repair rolls for the device; takes sprite's entire attention while active
Sustained barrage; first attack and each subsequent while sustained: (Resonance) DV Matrix damage + 2 noise to target; all electron storms end immediately if sprite takes any Matrix damage

rows.test: Hardware + Level [Attack] v. Device Rating + Firewall
rows.effect: Causes device malfunction; 1–3 net hits = standard glitch; 4+ net hits = critical glitch (GM chooses type)
Protect a file with unique Resonance algorithm; only sprite can unprotect; if sprite destroyed while carrying file, file is permanently corrupted; lasts up to Level × 10 Combat Turns

rows.test: none (passive while active on marked target)
rows.effect: Prevent normal malfunctions and accidents from afflicting marked target; ignore standard glitches; reduce critical glitches to standard glitches
While sprite is in a host using this power: any IC the host launches is delayed by (Level / 2) Combat Turns; delayed IC cannot act or be targeted

Tag an icon with an invisible Resonance-only visible marking; sprite can leave secret messages on Matrix objects; can overwrite existing watermarks; erasable with Erase Matrix Signature; otherwise lasts as long as the icon does

echoes.description: Technomancer echoes gained through Submersion. One echo per Submersion grade. Cannot take the same echo twice unless noted.

rows.effect: Living persona Attack +1
Living persona Data Processing +1
Living persona Firewall +1
Benefit of a Rating 1 control rig (effective rating increases by 1 per additional take, max 3)
+1 dice pool to resist biofeedback damage
+1D6 Initiative Dice while in hot-sim VR
One-way empathic link with chosen technomancer; discern dominant mood/emotions and danger sense; two-way if both take it
Copy effects of one common or hacking program; specify which program when taking this echo
Living persona Sleaze +1
